intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant 'Malya'. However, I can suggest that you might be referring to 'Mullein' or 'Mali' but I found information on another plant called 'Malva'. 

Malva (mallow plant) is a type of perennial herb belonging to the family Malvaceae. The health benefits of Malva include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce swelling. The bioactive constituents of Malva include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and mucilages, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Malva is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, coughs, and sore throats.
